div.div: RunRacing Multiplayer Racing Game — Multi-Region Backend

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 53px; margin-left: 17px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 16px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: Active-active AWS backend for real-time 8-player races (NA + EU, Asia-ready); Route 53 latency routing, server-side p95 < 50 ms
